# STScreenTimeConfigurationObserver

**Class**

The object you use to observe changes to the current configuration.

## Declaration

```swift
class STScreenTimeConfigurationObserver
```

## Overview

Use this class to start and stop observing the current configuration. For example, you can opt to disable private browsing in your web browser’s view controller when [doc://com.apple.Screen-Time/documentation/ScreenTime/STScreenTimeConfiguration/enforcesChildRestrictions] is `true`.

## Initializers

- **init(updateQueue:)**: Creates a configuration observer that reports updates on the queue you specify.

## Instance properties

- **configuration**: The configuration being observed.

## Instance methods

- **startObserving()**: Starts observing changes to the current configuration.
- **stopObserving()**: Stops observing changes to the current configuration.

## Configuration queries

- **STScreenTimeConfiguration**: The configuration for this device.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
